codeReview.summary: Complete and well-implemented GitHub Action for CI feedback gating. The implementation covers all 8 validation assertions (VAL-ACTION-001 through VAL-ACTION-008) with comprehensive test coverage (12 test cases). The composite action properly downloads platform-specific binaries, parses JSON export output via jq, applies threshold comparison and ignore-paths glob filtering, and handles all edge cases (missing .spikes/, empty feedback, resolved spikes). Punk/zine tone is present in error messages. The check.sh script is executable and follows shell best practices with set -euo pipefail.

summary: The GitHub Action feature is fully implemented and ready. All files are in place (action.yml, check.sh, README.md), 12 integration tests pass, and all 8 validation assertions are satisfied. The action correctly gates CI on feedback quality with configurable threshold, ignore-paths filtering, and require-resolution mode.
